FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f7a761db3d0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-02T15:00:38Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-02T14:58:52Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-02T15:00:38Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-02T14:58:52Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675179908 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675234550 if (!missing(height))

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675317576 new$version <- version
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675318337 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675344306 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675345228 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675358773 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675359544 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675372639 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675373401 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675385533 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675386325 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675398998 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675400060 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675413846 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675414668 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675443151 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675444223 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675458310 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675459141 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675471221 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675482683 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675589663 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675591677 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675605743 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675606294 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675616574 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675617005 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675627063 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675627484 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675637182 new$author <- author
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675637683 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675656128 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675660286 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675673119 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675692847 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675693999 "default"))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675713285 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675714257 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675732140 }
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675740726 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675759211 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675769570 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675780691 }

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675790179 }

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675809876 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675847426 old$family <- family

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675920784 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675921635 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/02 15:02:31.675935802 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),

2026/06/02 15:02:31.675952202 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
